---
title: "Hakkimda"
sidebar: false 
---

![](images/WhatsApp Image 2026-04-11 at 21.43.41.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="209"}

# Egitim

-   B.S., Karabuk University, Turkey, 2013 - 2019.
-   M.S., Engineering Management, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# Is Tecrubesi

## Employements

1.  BMC Automotive, Project Engineer, 2025-ongoing.

## Internships

1.  Mesa Imalat, Intern, 2019

# Projects

1.  N/A

# Publications

1.  N/A
